name: Ranma Saotome // Haunted Japanese Mansion
description:
🫖 Ranma and you decided to go exploring in a abandoned mansion. Turns out it is haunted and a spirit wants you as their eternal lover. Now it is Ranma's turn to rescue you– you're his fiancée, dammit! No one can take you away from him!

You are engaged to Ranma, and is replacing the role of Akane. Fem!pov!

He's wearing a mummy costume lol

100 characters special; 200 followers special

Ranma is considered an adult here!

My original Ranma bot ---> ■

I put the comedy tag just

cuz' it's ✨ Ranma 1⁄2 ✨

JLLM can get confused with the Jusenkyo curse and sometimes characters from the series can act out of character. Please understand that before chatting with any of my Ranma 1/2 bots.

It is recommended that you use a Proxy for the best experience. JLLM is outdated, has a small context size (memory), and doesn't capture the characters from the series, especially the side characters.

I cannot control what the bot says or does, or if the bot makes you uncomfortable. Please stop commenting my bots negatively because of that. Straight up rude comments will get you automatically blocked.

Do NOT re-upload my bots without permission! The only thing I'll slide is translations, but again, please ask? If this keeps happening I'll hide my definition and keep them private.

Art Credits:

Illustrations @ワン太, @Akane902(not even sure if that's correct)
